title: 2025-2026 FALL SEMESTER MASTER PROGRAMS ONLINE APPLICATIONS START ON JUNE 02, 2025....
content:
2025-2026 Fall Semester Online application start date: Monday, June 02, 2025

Last Application Date: Friday, July 18, 2025

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, July 23, 2025

Main List Final Registration Dates: July 23-August 04, 2025

Reserve List Final Registration Dates: August 05-15, 2025

Click for Online Pre-Registration Link

ALES Score Type: NUMERICAL (SAY)

PROGRAM FEES:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-ucretleri

Online Pre-Registration Link is below:

https://sis.uskudar.edu.tr/oibs/ina_app/login.aspx

Dear candidate students;

Can Science Exams be Held in Our Thesis/Non-Thesis Master's Programs?

1) In our thesis programs, 65% of ALES in the NUMERICAL score type and 35% of undergraduate graduation are not taken into account,

2) In non-thesis programs, 50% of undergraduate graduation grade, if any* 50% of ALES in the relevant score type are taken into account.

*(If the candidates' ALES scores are not given to non-thesis programs, they are included in the evaluation as 55 points.)

Applications of candidates who do not apply online, do not have a graduate status at the time of application, and upload their ALES document and identity information to the application system during application will be considered invalid.

-Original or preserved copy of undergraduate diploma

-Original or copy of undergraduate diploma (transcript)

-ALES exam result document (For thesis program)

-Population budget theater

-Photo (2 pieces)

ALES result document for thesis program applications;

ALES score will be taken into consideration in numerical score type.

-Applications can be ranked according to their success.

To be a graduate of a higher education program providing undergraduate (4-year) education in the Department of Nutrition and Dietetics.

NOTE: Equivalence of undergraduate diplomas registered abroad must be approved by the Council of Higher Education.

NOTE: Candidates who have received a score at least equivalent to the ALES exam from the "Graduate Record Examination" (GRE) or Graduate Management Admission Test (GMAT) exams, which are accepted as equivalent to the LES exam by the Interuniversity Board and are accepted internationally, will also be considered.

TUITION FEES:

https://uskudar.edu.tr/tr/yuksek-lisans-ucretleri
